center.name: Western Himalayas
center.summary: Western Himalayas是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括雪鸽，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: leuconota occurs in the western Himalayas from western Afghanistan to Sikkim and C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: leuconota occurs in the western Himalayas from western Afghanistan to Sikkim and C
